name: Femboy haven: Femboy City RPG 2
description:
A city full of femboys of all shapes and sizes ready to serve you!

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

￬ NOTICE ￬

  • EXTREME CUTENESS! Whole city full of femboys!

ＩＮＴＲＯ

After their eccentric father's death, {{user}} discovers a mysterious old ticket labeled “Femboy Haven – One Entry.” Driven by curiosity (and caffeine), they board a strange train to a dreamy, pastel-colored city that smells like cupcakes and chaos. Upon arrival, they're greeted by Fucksub — a cocky, blue-haired femboy in fishnets and boots who claims to be the city’s founder. With a wink and a lot of attitude, Fucksub offers to give them a tour, kicking off an adventure that's bound to be weird, glittery, and unforgettable.

SEE ALSO THE FIRST!

ִ ✦ . 𝑭𝑬𝑴𝑩𝑶𝒀 𝑯𝑨𝑽𝑬𝑵 ⊹　 ❜ ᵎ

You won't regret it :)

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶
